A short questionnaire captured fish‐eating habits and attitudes toward seafood. Results indicated that meal accompaniment significantly influenced acceptance, with the pasta dish receiving higher liking scores than the rice dish ( p < 0.05). Texture and flavor were the main sensory attributes driving preference, and prior familiarity with fish was associated with higher scores for both meals. These findings suggest that pairing sustainable fish species with familiar ingredients can increase children's willingness to consume them. Atlantic bonito is therefore a viable ingredient for school menus, supporting nutritional adequacy and resource sustainability. Incorporating sensory‐based consumer insights into menu planning may facilitate the successful introduction of underutilized fish to young populations, promoting healthier and more environmentally responsible eating patterns.
papers.summary_cn: 研究评估了葡萄牙小学生（6-10岁，n=192）对可持续利用的Atlantic Bonito（Sarda sarda）的接受度。通过5分喜好标度测试两种配餐（米饭vs意面），发现意面搭配的喜好度显著更高（p<0.05），质地和风味是主要感官驱动因素，且鱼类食用经验与评分正相关。结论表明，将可持续鱼类与熟悉食材搭配可提升儿童接受度，Atlantic Bonito可作为学校营养餐的可行选择。

papers.title: The influence of localized scallop aggregations on survey estimates and fisheries management
papers.authors: Delargy, Adam J; Lego, Craig A; Delargy, Amber Dawn; Stokesbury, Kevin D E
papers.summary_cn: 局部扇贝聚集对调查估计和渔业管理的影响。研究探讨了扇贝空间聚集性如何导致调查数据偏差，进而影响资源评估与管理决策。建议在调查设计中考虑聚集效应，以提高估计准确性。

papers.title: Analysis of Leading Capture Fisheries Commodities at Kema Fish Landing Base (PPI Kema) North Minahasa Regency
papers.authors: Rompis, Jendra; Budiman, Johnny; Sumilat, Deiske Adeliene; Luasunaung, Alfret
papers.abstract: This study aimed to identify leading capture fishery commodities based on landing production and evaluate fish resource utilization at Kema Fish Landing Base, North Minahasa Regency, Indonesia. A quantitative descriptive approach was applied using fish landing production and fishing activity data recorded through the enumerator system from January 2024 to February 2026. Data were analyzed using production composition, Fishing Power Index (FPI), Catch Per Unit Effort (CPUE), and the Schaefer surplus production model to estimate optimum fishing effort (Fopt), Maximum Sustainable Yield (MSY), and Total Allowable Catch (TAC). The results identified five leading fishery commodities, namely shortfin scad (Decapterus macrosoma), skipjack tuna (Katsuwonus pelamis), bigeye scad (Selar crumenophthalmus), bullet tuna (Auxis rochei), and yellowfin tuna (Thunnus albacares). The Schaefer model indicated that only skipjack tuna and yellowfin tuna satisfied the model assumptions, with estimated Fopt values of 168.66 and 126.14 standard trips, MSY values of 90.50 and 20.07 tons, and TAC values of 72.40 and 16.06 tons, respectively. Integrating production composition, FPI, CPUE, and the Schaefer surplus production model provided a comprehensive assessment of fish resource utilization and offered scientific information to support evidence-based and sustainable capture fisheries management at Kema Fish Landing Base. Keywords: Catch Per Unit Effort; Fishing Power Index; capture fisheries; leading fishery commodities; Schaefer surplus production model. Abstrak. Penelitian ini bertujuan mengidentifikasi komoditas unggulan berdasarkan produksi hasil tangkapan serta mengevaluasi tingkat pemanfaatan sumber daya ikan di Pangkalan Pendaratan Ikan (PPI) Kema, Kabupaten Minahasa Utara. Penelitian menggunakan metode deskriptif kuantitatif berdasarkan data produksi hasil tangkapan dan aktivitas penangkapan yang tercatat melalui sistem enumerator selama periode Januari 2024 hingga Februari 2026. Analisis dilakukan melalui komposisi produksi hasil tangkapan, Fishing Power Index (FPI), Catch Per Unit Effort (CPUE), dan model surplus produksi Schaefer untuk menduga optimum fishing effort (Fopt), Maximum Sustainable Yield (MSY), serta Jumlah Tangkapan yang Diperbolehkan (JTB). Hasil penelitian menunjukkan bahwa lima komoditas dengan kontribusi produksi terbesar berturut-turut adalah layang deles (Decapterus macrosoma), cakalang (Katsuwonus pelamis), selar bentong (Selar crumenophthalmus), tongkol cerutu (Auxis rochei), dan madidihang (Thunnus albacares). Pendugaan model Schaefer menunjukkan bahwa hanya komoditas cakalang dan madidihang memenuhi asumsi model dengan nilai Fopt masing-masing sebesar 168,66 dan 126,14 trip standar, nilai MSY sebesar 90,50 ton dan 20,07 ton, serta JTB sebesar 72,40 ton dan 16,06 ton. Integrasi analisis komposisi produksi, FPI, CPUE, dan model Schaefer memberikan gambaran yang lebih komprehensif mengenai tingkat pemanfaatan sumber daya ikan sehingga dapat mendukung pengelolaan perikanan tangkap berbasis data di PPI Kema. Kata kunci: atch Per Unit Effort; Fishing Power Index; komoditas unggulan; model surplus produksi Schaefer; perikanan tangkap
papers.summary_cn: 本研究基于2024年1月至2026年2月印尼Kema渔获上岸基地的渔获量和捕捞活动数据，采用生产组成、Fishing Power Index (FPI)、CPUE及Schaefer surplus production model，识别出五种主要渔获商品（短鳍圆鲹、鲣鱼、大眼圆鲹、扁舵鲣、黄鳍金枪鱼），并估算其最适捕捞努力量（Fopt）、最大可持续产量（MSY）和总可捕量（TAC）。结果显示仅鲣鱼和黄鳍金枪鱼满足模型假设，其MSY分别为90.50吨和20.07吨，TAC分别为72.40吨和16.06吨。该综合评估方法为PPI Kema基于数据的可持续捕捞管理提供了科学依据。

papers.title: The diminishing social context in fisheries: changes in fleet dynamics research – a systematic review
papers.authors: Aprian, Mukti; Adrianto, Luky; Suadi; Jayanti, Anes Dwi
papers.summary_cn: 系统综述渔业船队动态研究的社会背景变化趋势，发现该领域研究逐渐脱离社会因素分析。通过梳理文献揭示研究焦点从社会-生态耦合转向技术与管理层面，导致对渔业社区影响的关注度下降。

papers.title: Unpacking power dynamics and actor interactions across fisheries and marine protected areas governance: a comparative study of Saint Louis and Sangomar, Senegal
papers.authors: Senghor, Khadidiatou; Schlüter, Achim
papers.abstract: Abstract This paper investigates the power dynamics and actor interactions shaping the governance of fisheries and marine protected areas (MPAs) in Senegal, with a comparative focus on two key sites: Saint Louis and Sangomar. Governance in these areas involves the overlapping mandates of multiple institutions, including conservation-focused policies led by the Ministry of Environment -and Sustainable Development and fisheries management overseen by the Ministry of Fisheries and Maritime Economy. Additionally, local governance bodies such as artisanal fishing committees, fishing associations, and marine protected area management committees add further complexity to the governance landscape. Using qualitative content analysis, this study explores three central questions: (1) What are the linkages among the various actors involved in fisheries and conservation collective action? (2) How does power manifest in the relationships between these actors? (3) How do actors’ positions and decisions influence collective action? The study draws on data collected through interviews, focus group discussions, and participant observations, offering a rich qualitative perspective on governance dynamics. Preliminary findings reveal stark differences between the governance structures in Saint Louis and Sangomar. Governance in Saint Louis is marked by a limited interaction among actors, weak adherence to conservation efforts, and the predominance of commercial fishing. In contrast, Sangomar displays a stronger community participation, active involvement of women, and an emphasis on subsistence fishing. Power relations in Saint Louis are hierarchical and rooted in traditional authority, whereas in Sangomar they are more distributed, driven by cooperative values and collective decision-making. By empirically operationalizing a multidimensional power framework, the paper shows how institutional coexistence alone does not explain governance outcomes, and how power relations mediate the effectiveness and legitimacy of fisheries and MPA governance. Rather than separating fisheries governance from MPA governance, the study examines how actors navigate overlapping conservation and fisheries institutions across interconnected coastal spaces.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究比较塞内加尔圣路易和桑戈马尔两地渔业与海洋保护区（MPA）治理中的权力动态与行动者互动。通过定性内容分析（访谈、焦点小组、参与观察），发现两地治理结构差异显著：圣路易呈现行动者互动有限、商业捕捞主导、传统权威主导的等级制权力关系；桑戈马尔则社区参与更强、女性活跃、以生计渔业为主，权力分布更趋合作与集体决策。研究揭示制度共存本身不足以解释治理成效，权力关系调节着渔业与MPA治理的有效性与合法性。

papers.title: Dissolved-oxygen gradients and fish passage in large-river tailraces: a KITS framework
papers.authors: Zhang, Sicheng; Wang, Congfeng; Liu, Defu
papers.summary_cn: 基于KITS框架，研究大型河流尾水区溶解氧梯度对鱼类洄游通道的影响。通过分析溶解氧空间分布与鱼类行为响应，揭示低氧区对鱼类上溯的阻碍机制。该框架为评估和改善水利工程下游鱼类栖息地连通性提供了定量工具。

papers.title: Anesthetic Driven Hematological Dynamics in Farmed Fish: What Do We Know?
papers.authors: Bardhan, Avishek; Murthy, Shivananda H.; Pulugurtha, Karthik; King-Nobles, Haven; Chattopadhyay, Camelia; Mukherjee, Debapriyo
papers.abstract: Anesthetic agents are widely used in aquaculture to facilitate handling, transport, surgery, vaccination, tagging, and other husbandry procedures. However, most previous reviews have primarily focused on induction time, recovery duration, and welfare outcomes, with comparatively limited emphasis on blood physiology as an indicator of systemic anesthetic safety. The present review synthesizes current evidence regarding hematological, hemato-biochemical, blood gas, and immunohematological alterations induced by major anesthetic classes in aquaculture species. Literature published between 2000 and 2026 was retrieved from Scopus, Web of Science, Google Scholar, PubMed, ScienceDirect, and Springer Nature databases, with approximately 150 studies included following structured screening. Available evidence indicates that anesthetic exposure frequently alters erythrocyte and leukocyte profiles, cortisol secretion, glucose and lactate metabolism, hepatic enzyme activity, electrolyte balance, acid–base regulation, and blood oxygen transport. Respiratory depression, hypercapnia, hypoxemia, and transient metabolic acidosis were recurrent consequences of deep anesthesia, particularly during prolonged exposure or unfavorable environmental conditions. Several anesthetics also modulated innate immune responses through alterations in complement activity, respiratory burst function, cytokine signaling, and leukocyte redistribution. Collectively, the review highlights blood physiology as an essential framework for evaluating anesthetic safety and improving welfare-oriented aquaculture practices.
papers.summary_cn: 该综述系统总结了2000-2026年间养殖鱼类麻醉剂对血液生理的影响，涵盖红细胞与白细胞谱、皮质醇分泌、糖代谢、肝酶活性、电解质平衡及血氧运输等指标。研究发现，深度麻醉常引发呼吸抑制、高碳酸血症、低氧血症及短暂代谢性酸中毒，尤其在长时间暴露或不利环境条件下。部分麻醉剂还通过调节补体活性、呼吸爆发功能及细胞因子信号影响先天免疫。研究强调血液生理是评估麻醉安全性和改善养殖福利的关键框架。

papers.title: Lethal Effects of Sugar Industry Effluent on Behaviour and Mortality in the Freshwater Fish Chanda nama
papers.authors: Kakade, Vinod B.
papers.abstract: Discharge of industrial, municipal and agricultural wastewater into freshwater ecosystems introduces pollutants such as heavy metals, nutrients and organic loads that can affect aquatic organisms. In the present study, the lethal and behavioural effects of sugar industry effluent were assessed in the freshwater small indigenous fish Chanda nama collected from the Bhima River. Effluent was collected from the canal confluence at Patas village, and test fish were acclimatised under laboratory conditions before exposure. Acute toxicity bioassays were conducted for 24, 48, 72 and 96 hours using different concentrations of sugar industry effluent. The estimated LC50 values declined with increasing exposure duration, from 15.5% at 24 hours to 15.0%, 14.5% and 14.0% at 48, 72 and 96 hours, respectively. Fish exposed to lethal concentrations exhibited clear behavioural changes, including increased opercular movement, jerky and erratic swimming, excitation, loss of equilibrium, attempts to escape from the aquarium, leaping out of water and repeated contact with the aquarium wall. Mortality increased with concentration and exposure duration, indicating a time-dependent toxic response under laboratory conditions. The findings suggest that untreated or inadequately treated sugar industry effluent may cause acute stress and mortality in freshwater fish. Proper effluent treatment, routine monitoring and further chemical characterisation are needed to better understand the toxic components and reduce potential ecological risks.
papers.summary_cn: 研究糖厂废水对淡水鱼类Chanda nama的急性毒性效应。通过96小时急性毒性实验测定LC50值，发现随暴露时间延长LC50从24小时的15.5%降至96小时的14.0%。暴露于致死浓度的鱼出现鳃盖运动加快、游动异常、失去平衡等行为变化，死亡率和浓度及暴露时间呈正相关。结果表明未经处理的糖厂废水可对淡水鱼造成急性胁迫和死亡，需加强废水处理与监测。

papers.title: Recovering a Forgotten Wetland in Western Anatolia: Birds and Fish from Second-Millennium BCE Kaymakçı
papers.authors: Luke, Christina; Yalçın, Tuğçe; Kamjan, Safoora; Roosevelt, Christopher H.
papers.abstract: Wetlands sustained some of the most exceptionally dynamic human–environment relationships in past societies. Tracing their presence and ecological characteristics in antiquity requires integrated recovery strategies that link excavation, systematic sampling, and laboratory analysis. This paper presents new zooarchaeological evidence from Middle and Late Bronze Age Kaymakçı in the Marmara Lake Basin of western Türkiye to present evidence of an ancient wetland. Situated in the middle Gediz Valley within a pulse-lake landscape shaped by seasonal flooding, spring discharge, and ecological verticality extending from the basin floor to approximately 2150 m at the peak of Bozdağ, Kaymakçı is currently the largest-known second-millennium BCE settlement not only in this niche zone, but also in wider western Anatolia. The Kaymakçı Archeological Project (KAP) results show that recovery methods, especially heavy fraction, may significantly affect the resulting data and, therefore, the interpretations. The identified fish remains from KAP, dominated by carp and catfish, confirm a large, shallow, vegetated wetland with fluctuating littoral and flood-zone habitats. Bird remains also evidence a taxonomically diverse bird community typical of large wetland zones with nearby mountain ranges, including waterfowl, marsh-edge, and terrestrial taxa. Compared with contemporaneous Anatolian assemblages from central and southeastern regions of Anatolia, the KAP data extend our understanding of seasonally dynamic wetlands in western Anatolia and further confirm the value of integrated faunal analysis.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过土耳其西部Kaymakçı遗址的动物考古证据，重建青铜时代湿地生态系统。采用发掘、系统采样与实验室分析相结合的回收策略，发现鱼类（以鲤鱼和鲶鱼为主）和鸟类遗存，证实该区域曾存在大型浅水植被湿地。与安纳托利亚中部和东南部同期遗址对比，揭示了季节性动态湿地的生态特征，强调重浮选等回收方法对数据解释的关键影响。

papers.title: Molecular cytogenetic analysis in Pseudorasbora parva (Cypriniformes: Gobionidae)—important invasive fish species in Türkiye
papers.authors: Arslan, Atilla; Arslan, Emine; Özçay Ekşi, Büşra; Alpaslan, Zafer; Sember, Alexandr
papers.summary_cn: 对土耳其重要入侵鱼类麦穗鱼（Pseudorasbora parva）进行分子细胞遗传学分析，旨在揭示其染色体特征与入侵机制的关系。通过细胞遗传学方法研究其核型及基因组结构，为理解该物种在土耳其水域的扩散与适应提供遗传学基础。

papers.title: Decoding biological aging in Sparus aurata through a gene toolbox to infer welfare assessment and precision aquaculture interventions
papers.authors: Naya-Català, Fernando; Gasperini, Alice; Carbonero-Acín, Beatriz; Calduch-Giner, Josep; Belenguer, Álvaro; Pérez-Sánchez, Jaume
papers.abstract: Abstract Biological age (BA) has emerged as a promising integrative indicator of physiological state and welfare, but its use within aquaculture remains underdeveloped. Previous genome-wide analysis in gilthead sea bream revealed skeletal muscle markers with inverse age-related expression and methylation patterns. Specifically, psmd2 , ramp1 , sirt1 and smad1 were up-regulated and hypomethylated with age, while atp1a2 , bmp1 , calcrl , col5a1 , spred2 and thrb exhibited down-regulation coupled with hypermethylation. Here we assessed the responsiveness of this gene set across multiple aquaculture-relevant challenges using a real-time PCR array. Environmental stressors (e.g. increased temperature and high stocking density with low O 2 concentration) induced transcriptional profiles resembling muscle gene-expression patterns of older individuals. Conversely, cold exposure and nutritional interventions, including restricted feeding and feed supplementation with bioactive protein hydrolysates, microalgae meal with a PUFA-rich lipid source, or fat emulsifiers promoted signatures aligned with those observed in younger animals. Although the direct reversal of stress-induced aging signatures was not tested, results indicate that dietary interventions elicit opposing transcriptional patterns, highlighting potential strategies to mitigate environmentally mediated aquaculture stress through targeted nutrition. These findings provide preliminary evidence of a potential relationship between BA and aquaculture stressors in farmed fish, underpinning a genomics-based framework for welfare assessment and adaptive management.
papers.summary_cn: 通过基因工具箱解码金头鲷（Sparus aurata）生物学衰老过程，以评估福利并实施精准水产养殖干预。研究基于全基因组分析筛选出与年龄表达和甲基化模式相关的肌肉标记基因，利用实时PCR阵列检测这些基因在多种养殖挑战下的响应。环境应激（如高温、高密度低氧）诱导类似老年个体的转录谱，而冷暴露及营养干预（限饲、添加生物活性蛋白水解物、富含PUFA的微藻脂质或脂肪乳化剂）则呈现年轻化特征。结果表明，饮食调控可逆转环境应激诱导的衰老相关转录模式，为通过靶向营养缓解养殖应激、建立基于基因组学的福利评估与适应性管理框架提供了初步证据。

papers.title: Land Suitability for Kappaphycus alvarezii Aquaculture in Loleo Waters, Central Halmahera
papers.authors: Julhasnah Hasanuddin; Aris, Muhammad; Irham, Irham
papers.abstract: This study aimed to assess the land suitability for the cultivation of Kappaphycus alvarezii in the coastal waters of Loleo Village, South Weda District, Central Halmahera Regency, Indonesia. Data were collected from January to February 2026 across seven observation stations. The analyzed parameters included depth, water transparency, temperature, pH, salinity, dissolved oxygen (DO), nitrate, and phosphate. Land suitability analysis was conducted using a weighted scoring method based on the relative influence of each parameter. The results were classified into three suitability classes: highly suitable (S1), moderately suitable (S2), and unsuitable (N). The results indicated that the overall water conditions were generally within the optimal range for the growth of K. alvarezii, particularly in terms of salinity, pH, and dissolved oxygen. However, relatively high temperatures and low nutrient concentrations were identified as the main limiting factors. The spatial analysis showed that the study area consisted of 37 ha classified as highly suitable (S1), 113 ha as moderately suitable (S2), and 63 ha as unsuitable (N), with a total potential cultivation area of 150 ha. These findings suggest that the Loleo waters have significant potential for seaweed aquaculture development, provided that adaptive management strategies are implemented. Keywords: Central Halmahera; Kappaphycus alvarezii; land suitability; water quality
papers.summary_cn: 本研究评估了印度尼西亚中哈马黑拉Loleo海域养殖长心卡帕藻（Kappaphycus alvarezii）的土地适宜性。通过加权评分法分析水深、透明度、温度、pH、盐度、溶解氧、硝酸盐和磷酸盐等参数，将研究区划分为高度适宜（S1）、中度适宜（S2）和不适宜（N）三类。结果显示，盐度、pH和溶解氧总体处于最优范围，但较高温度和较低营养盐是主要限制因子。研究区潜在养殖面积150 ha，其中S1类37 ha、S2类113 ha、N类63 ha，表明该海域在实施适应性管理策略下具有显著的海藻养殖开发潜力。

papers.title: Hydrochemical Characteristics of Groundwater in Aquaculture-Dominated Regions: A Review
papers.authors: prasanna Babu, Racheeti; Bhushan Kumar, Lanka
papers.journal: International Journal of Science and Research (IJSR)
papers.summary_cn: 综述了以水产养殖为主导区域的地下水水化学特征，旨在总结该领域研究现状。通过文献回顾，分析了养殖活动对地下水水质的影响机制。主要发现包括养殖废水排放导致地下水盐度、氮磷及有机物含量升高，且区域水化学类型受地质背景与养殖强度的共同控制。

papers.title: One snack before the road: Egg cannibalism in post-spawning Downs herring
papers.authors: Cresson, Pierre; Desomberg, Lea; Couvreur, Clémence; Cordier, Rémy; Telliez, Solène; Toomey, Lola; Giraldo, Carolina
papers.abstract: Atlantic herring is a zooplanktivorous keystone species in the North Atlantic, preyed by piscivorous species and harvested by fisheries. Herring relies on stored energy as feeding ceases during migration and spawning. In the Downs subpopulation, this strategy is particularly demanding due to the long spawning migration. Feeding resumption after spawning is paramount but the English Channel provides few resources. Egg cannibalism is a potential solution to overpass scarcity of resources that has never been demonstrated before. In this study, we applied automated prey image analysis to estimate egg consumption and the importance of egg cannibalism for pre- and post-spawning herrings. The observation of several hundred of eggs in stomachs proved that cannibalism is adopted by post-spawning herring to cope with the energetic debt, and to provide the energy needed to begin the back migration.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以Downs亚群大西洋鲱为对象，通过自动猎物图像分析技术估算其卵摄食量，旨在验证产卵后鲱鱼通过同类相食（egg cannibalism）应对能量短缺的假说。在数百个胃含物中观察到大量鱼卵，证实产卵后鲱鱼通过同类相食弥补能量亏空，为洄游提供必需能量。该发现首次揭示了鲱鱼在资源匮乏的英吉利海峡中的能量补偿策略。

papers.title: Linkages between marine and riverine environmental phenology and adult Atlantic salmon return timing
papers.authors: Mills, Katherine E.; Barajas, Miguel Fillion; Mulvey-Mcferron, Owen; Thomas, Andrew AC; Valliere, Jason R.; Kocik, John F.
papers.abstract: Phenological changes are occurring around the world as climate change alters the timing of life history processes, such as animal migrations. This study demonstrates linkages between environmental change and Atlantic salmon (Salmo salar) migration dynamics. From 1983-2019, adult Atlantic salmon returned earlier from the ocean to the Penobscot River, Maine. Median return dates advanced 12 days per decade for one sea-winter (1SW) salmon and seven days per decade for multi-sea-winter (MSW) salmon. The strongest advances occurred late in the run, with the 95th percentile of adults returning 19 (1SW) and 23 (MSW) days earlier per decade. Late-stage advancement contracted run duration by 12 (1SW) and 17 (MSW) days per decade. Ocean seasonality—particularly the length of winter and summer based on sea surface temperatures—was most strongly associated with earlier returns. For some run segments, the timing of freshwater flows and the start of summer riverine temperatures influenced return dates. Findings reveal changes in Northwest Atlantic Ocean temperature phenology, link shifting environmental phenology to migration phenology, and identify concerns about Atlantic salmon adaptiveness.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究探讨了海洋与河流环境物候变化对大西洋鲑（Salmo salar）成鱼洄游时间的影响。基于1983-2019年缅因州Penobscot河数据，发现成鱼返河时间显著提前：单冬海（1SW）鲑中位返河日期每十年提前12天，多冬海（MSW）鲑每十年提前7天，且洄游后期提前幅度更大（95百分位分别提前19和23天/十年），导致洄游持续时间缩短。海洋季节变化（尤其基于海表温度的冬季和夏季长度）是主要驱动因素，部分洄游阶段也受淡水流量和河流夏季水温影响。结果揭示了西北大西洋海洋温度物候变化与鲑鱼洄游物候的关联，引发对其适应性的担忧。

papers.title: Human impacts on fish biodiversity in the Yangtze River Basin: a multidimensional assessment using the Cumulative Change in Biodiversity Facets (CCBF) index
papers.authors: Du, Juan; Zhao, Kangshun; Brosse, Sébastien; He, Guoyu; Xu, Jun; Yu, Lixiong; Chen, Daqing; Liu, Mingdian; Duan, Xinbin; Su, Guohuan
papers.journal: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries
papers.summary_cn: 利用累积生物多样性变化指数（CCBF），从多维度评估长江流域鱼类生物多样性受人类活动影响的程度。该研究整合物种、功能和系统发育多样性，量化人类干扰对鱼类群落的结构性改变。结果显示，人类活动显著降低了长江流域的鱼类生物多样性，尤其在功能多样性维度上表现突出。
papers.keywords_matched: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries

papers.title: Diel, seasonal and ontogenetic changes in the movement and habitat use of the Indo‐Pacific eel Anguilla marmorata in a small subtropical river
papers.authors: Kumai, Yusuke; Kuroki, Mari; Mitamura, Hiromichi; Ichikawa, Kotaro; Watanabe, Shun; Kume, Manabu; Tanaka, Tomoichiro; Watanabe, Tomoki; Hirasawa, Tomohiro; Yamakawa, Takashi
papers.abstract: Abstract Despite increasing conservation concerns, information on diel, seasonal and ontogenetic changes in the movement patterns and habitat use in rivers remains limited for anguillid eels. Here, we used manual radiotelemetry to investigate these changes using 10 Indo‐Pacific eel Anguilla marmorata individuals of varying body sizes [364–1030 mm total length (TL)] in a small subtropical river in southern Japan over a period of up to 10 months. Our Bayesian models revealed that the eels exhibited strong site fidelity throughout the year, with noticeable shifts in daytime shelter positions occurring only occasionally. Additionally, the models showed that the nocturnal movement distances by eels from their daytime shelters were also limited and remained almost constant year‐round, although larger individuals moved farther than smaller ones. Regarding their habitat use, there were no consistent diel and seasonal changes in habitat types used across individuals. However, larger individuals clearly used deeper, more lentic microhabitats with smaller substrate sizes during the daytime in all seasons. These results suggest that despite the limited movements in small rivers, A. marmorata requires a variety of habitats in rivers throughout the life stages, underscoring the importance of maintaining habitat heterogeneity for effective conservation.
papers.summary_cn: 采用无线电遥测技术，研究了日本南部亚热带小型河流中10尾不同体长（364-1030 mm全长）的花鳗鲡（Anguilla marmorata）的昼夜、季节和个体发育运动及栖息地利用变化。贝叶斯模型显示，鳗鲡全年表现出强栖息地忠诚度，仅偶尔发生日间庇护所位置转移；夜间移动距离有限且全年稳定，但较大个体移动更远。栖息地类型无一致的昼夜或季节变化，但较大个体在日间偏好更深、流速更缓、底质粒径更小的微生境。结果表明，尽管在小型河流中运动受限，花鳗鲡全生命周期仍需多样化栖息地，维持栖息地异质性对有效保护至关重要。

papers.title: A new species of the whalefish genus Cetomimus , with comments and a key to the congeners (Actinopterygii: Cetomimidae)
papers.authors: Su, Yo; Paxton, John R.; Trnski, Thomas; Ho, Hsuan‐Ching
papers.abstract: Abstract A new species of the whalefish genus Cetomimus is described based on eight female specimens from the Japanese seas, eastern Australia and the South Atlantic. The females of the new species, Cetomimus papilio sp. nov ., can be distinguished from its congeners by the presence of tent‐like lateral‐line flaps that are wider than the lateral‐line canal, lateral‐line pores 11–14, internal cavernous tissue surrounding the anus and the urogenital papilla, forming pseudocloaca, body depth 26.8%–32.4% SL and head length 36.2%–42.0% SL. Reassessments of the literature records of the genus and species are provided, along with a revised diagnosis for the females in the genus and an identification key to the nominal species of Cetomimus.
papers.summary_cn: 基于日本海域、东澳大利亚和南大西洋的8尾雌性标本，描述鲸鱼属新种Cetomimus papilio sp. nov.。该新种可通过帐篷状侧线皮瓣（宽于侧线管）、侧线孔11-14个、肛门和尿殖乳头周围形成假泄殖腔的内部海绵组织、体深26.8%-32.4% SL及头长36.2%-42.0% SL等特征与同属其他物种区分。研究重新评估了该属和种的文献记录，修订了雌性属级诊断，并提供了Cetomimus属名义种的检索表。

papers.title: Integrating local ecological knowledge with ICES and CPUE data to assess spatial variation in Baltic Sea fish stocks
papers.authors: Rosciszewski-Dodgson, Michael J.; Cirella, Giuseppe T.
papers.summary_cn: 结合当地生态知识、ICES调查数据及CPUE数据，评估波罗的海鱼类种群的空间变异。研究整合多源信息以改进stock assessment的空间精度，为区域渔业管理提供依据。

papers.title: Integrating lipid and isotopic analyses to reveal snow petrel diet dynamics in the Weddell Sea
papers.authors: Li, Zhongxuan; Wakefield, Ewan; Gröcke, Darren R.; Grecian, W. James; Flores, Hauke; Honan, Eleanor; Woll, Matthias; Strong, Kerry A.; Méheust, Marie; West, Martin D.
papers.summary_cn: 利用脂质与同位素分析整合方法，揭示威德尔海雪鹱的食性动态变化，为理解南极海洋食物网结构提供新视角。

papers.title: Diet of the glacial squid Psychroteuthis glacialis in the Ross Sea region, Antarctica
papers.authors: Lischka, Alexandra; Stevens, Darren W; van Dijk, Stephan; Pinkerton, Matt; Bolstad, Kathrin; Dunn, Matthew; Braid, Heather
papers.summary_cn: 研究南极罗斯海区域冰川鱿鱼（Psychroteuthis glacialis）的食性组成。通过胃含物分析等方法，揭示其主要摄食鱼类、头足类及甲壳类等饵料生物，为理解该物种在南极海洋生态系统中的营养地位提供基础数据。

papers.title: Differential response of gametophyte and sporophyte priming to heat stress of Saccharina latissima sporophytes across different age classes
papers.authors: Steiner, Niko; Nilsen, Anne Margrete Leiros; Gauci, Clément; Jüterbock, Alexander; Bartsch, Inka
papers.summary_cn: 研究不同年龄的糖海带（Saccharina latissima）孢子体在配子体和孢子体阶段对热胁迫的启动响应差异。通过比较不同龄级孢子体的热应激反应，揭示配子体与孢子体在热记忆形成上的分化机制。结果表明，热启动效应在孢子体发育阶段具有年龄依赖性，为海带养殖应对气候变暖提供理论依据。

papers.title: A chromosome-level, gap-free genome assembly of the fish parasite Trypanosoma larimichthysi from large yellow croaker
papers.authors: Lv, Xin; Liu, Lanying; Zhang, Zhideng; Liu, Yang; Huang, Wei; Li, Shuigen; Chen, Yanting; Chen, Qinghe; Luo, Tuyan
papers.abstract: Abstract Marine fish trypanosomes are widespread hemoparasites that pose significant threats to wild and farmed teleosts, yet they remain genomically underrepresented compared to their mammalian-infecting counterparts. Here, we present the first chromosome-level, gap-free genome assembly of Trypanosoma larimichthysi , a recently described species causing severe trypanosomiasis outbreaks in the economically important large yellow croaker ( Larimichthys crocea ) along the Chinese coast. The assembly, generated using PacBio HiFi long-read sequencing combined with Hi-C chromatin conformation capture, spans 51.04 Mb across exactly 35 pseudochromosomes, with a contig N50 of 1.43 Mb and 97.96% of sequences anchored. Exceptional completeness is evidenced by telomere-to-telomere resolution for 25 chromosomes (58 telomeric loci captured in total), a 99.99% HiFi read mapping rate, and > 99% BUSCO completeness. The genome encodes 10,172 protein-coding genes, with repetitive sequences comprising 50.33%, dominated by retrotransposons including LINE and LTR elements. Comparative genomic analyses confirm the phylogenetic placement of T. larimichthysi within Trypanosoma and reveal lineage-specific gene family expansions potentially linked to host adaptation and pathogenicity. This reference-grade genome fills a critical gap in aquatic trypanosomatid genomics and provides a valuable resource for investigating parasite evolution, host–parasite interactions, antigenic variation mechanisms, and disease management strategies in mariculture.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究首次组装了大黄鱼寄生性锥虫Trypanosoma larimichthysi的染色体级别无缺口基因组，该寄生虫对中国沿海重要经济鱼类大黄鱼造成严重锥虫病。采用PacBio HiFi长读长测序与Hi-C染色质构象捕获技术，获得51.04 Mb的基因组，包含35条假染色体，contig N50达1.43 Mb，25条染色体实现端粒到端粒完整解析。基因组注释出10,172个蛋白编码基因，重复序列占50.33%，以LINE和LTR逆转录转座子为主。比较基因组学确认其系统发育位置，并发现与宿主适应和致病性相关的谱系特异性基因家族扩张，为研究水生锥虫进化、宿主-寄生虫互作及海水养殖病害防控提供了重要基因组资源。

papers.title: Morph-specific dorsal fin characteristics and sex steroids in muscles across life history stages in a sex dynamic marine fish, Lythrypnus dalli
papers.authors: Starkey, J M; White, K J; Sapkota, R; Richards, C J; Barber, S L; Pradhan, D S
papers.abstract: Abstract While sex steroids orchestrate the organization and activation of external anatomical and behavioral phenotypes, tissue specific mechanisms that regulate these processes are largely unknown. To understand the regulation of both fixed and plastic morphological and endocrine characteristics across social contexts, we investigated the bluebanded goby, Lythrypnus dalli, a sexually plastic fish. The distribution and density of androgen receptors is sexually dimorphic in skeletal muscles of these fish and is associated with courtship displays in males. The supracarinalis muscle, which runs dorsal and parallel to the spinal cord is used for courtship displays by males and for aggressive displays by all L. dalli morphs. Here, we first investigated dorsal fin lengths across fish from different life history stages. We found that while the distribution of dorsal fin sizes exists on a continuum, 45.54% of males had dramatically longer dorsal fins compared to females, and dorsal fin lengths increased within 10 days of protogynous (female to male) sex change. Epaxial and hypaxial are trunk muscles that power all movements through association with all limb muscles in fish. We conducted two separate studies to examine sex steroid levels in skeletal muscles of fish housed either in larger open communities, or in smaller, isolated groups. In fish from community groups, supracarinalis muscles in males had significantly higher levels of 11-ketotestosterone and lower estradiol compared to females, while isolated groups had no sex differences. In fish from isolated groups, only the epaxial and hypaxial muscles had plastic endocrine responses such that within only 5 days of transition, protogynous fish had significantly higher 11-ketotestosterone compared to stable males and intermediate estradiol compared to stable males and females. Overall, endocrine changes preceded morphometric changes and exhibited plasticity across different environments and life history stages. These results support the presence of many traits, from external morphological features to the cryptic endocrine level, that contribute to the occurrence of multiple morphs across life history stages in L. dalli. The integration of these phenotypes is important to understand the mechanisms that regulate the functional performance of behavioral displays in specific social contexts.
papers.summary_cn: 研究蓝带虾虎鱼（Lythrypnus dalli）不同生活史阶段背鳍形态及肌肉性类固醇水平。发现雄性背鳍显著长于雌性（45.54%个体），且性转变后10天内背鳍增长。社群环境中雄性上脊肌11-酮基睾酮显著高于雌性，雌二醇较低；隔离组无性别差异。隔离组中，性转变5天内轴肌11-酮基睾酮显著高于稳定雄性，雌二醇介于两性之间。内分泌变化先于形态变化，且在不同环境与生活史阶段具有可塑性。

papers.title: A Study of Production Economics and Profitability of Fish Farming in Kalahandi District, Odisha, India
papers.authors: Bag, Bharadwaj; Das, Rakhi; Tripathy, Pritam; Saxena, Shriparna
papers.abstract: Aquaculture has emerged as an important livelihood and food-security activity in Kalahandi district, Odisha, where drought-prone agriculture and limited rural income opportunities have encouraged diversification towards pond-based fish farming. This study analysed the cost structure, profitability and constraints associated with fish farming in the district. A total of 125 fish farmers were selected from Bhawanipatna, Narla and Dharamgarh blocks through stratified random sampling, and data were collected through face-to-face interviews using a structured and pre-tested schedule. The analysis used descriptive statistics, frequencies, percentages and the Cost-Benefit Ratio (CBR) to assess the economic viability of aquaculture. The findings show that fish farming in the study area is largely practised by young and relatively inexperienced farmers, with semi-intensive culture being the dominant production system. Most respondents operated small ponds, and many depended on seasonal or revenue ponds. The average CBR of 1.62 indicates that aquaculture was financially remunerative under the observed conditions. However, high feed costs, limited access to quality seed, insufficient technical knowledge, inadequate extension support, credit constraints, weak infrastructure and market-related challenges restricted productivity and profitability. The study suggests that strengthening hatchery development, improving input availability, expanding farmer training, simplifying credit access and enhancing market linkages may support more sustainable and profitable aquaculture in Kalahandi district.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究分析了印度奥里萨邦Kalahandi地区池塘养鱼的成本结构、盈利能力和制约因素。基于125名养鱼户的分层随机抽样调查，采用成本效益比（CBR）评估经济可行性。结果显示，半精养系统为主，平均CBR为1.62，表明养鱼具有财务回报，但高饲料成本、优质苗种获取难、技术知识不足及市场限制等问题制约了生产力和利润。建议加强苗种培育、改善投入品供应、扩大培训并简化信贷以促进可持续盈利。

papers.title: Development and Quality Evaluation of Fish Sauce (Patis) from Lantern Fish (Benthosema pterotum): Physicochemical, Sensory, and Microbiological Analyses
papers.authors: Sales, Glend S.; Bigueja, Myrna C.; Formanes, Christine B.; Jr., Tomas C. Sales
papers.journal: International Journal of Innovative Science and Research Technology
papers.abstract: This study evaluated the physicochemical, sensory, and microbiological qualities of fish sauce (patis) produced from lantern fish (Benthosema pterotum), locally known as “Sirum-sirum,” an underutilized by-catch species commonly found in the coastal waters of Pasacao, Camarines Sur, Philippines. The study aimed to determine the most acceptable fishto-salt ratio for fish sauce production and assess the nutritional and microbial quality of the resulting product. Fresh lantern fish were fermented using three fish-to-salt ratio treatments: Treatment 1 (1:3), Treatment 2 (1:4), and Treatment 3 (1:5) for a period of 90 days. The fermented fish sauce was subjected to sensory evaluation, proximate analysis, and microbiological examination. Results of the sensory evaluation revealed significant differences among treatments in flavor, odor, and saltiness, while no significant difference was observed in color.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以菲律宾沿海常见低值副渔获物灯笼鱼（Benthosema pterotum）为原料，通过三种鱼盐比（1:3、1:4、1:5）发酵90天制备鱼露（patis），评估其理化、感官及微生物品质。感官评价显示不同处理在风味、气味和咸度上存在显著差异，但颜色无显著差异。研究确定了最适鱼盐比，并证实该产品具有可接受的营养与微生物质量，为灯笼鱼的高值化利用提供了依据。

papers.title: Climate‐informed stock‐recruitment models identify potential environmental links for commercial fish stocks
papers.authors: Marshall, Rachel C.; Collie, Jeremy S.; Bell, Richard J.; Spencer, Paul D.; Minto, Cóilín
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Several studies have demonstrated non‐stationarity in marine fish maximum per capita recruitment rate, which may be linked to regional environmental drivers. Exploring relationships between environmental drivers and time‐varying recruitment rate will provide insight into recruitment processes, and suggest how fisheries managers may adapt biological reference points and adjust harvest‐control rules in response to changes in the ecosystem state. To test for significant effects on the recruitment rate of 48 commercial United States fish stocks with nonstationary per‐capita recruitment, environmental indices from two Atlantic and three Pacific regions are incorporated into a state‐space dynamic Ricker stock‐recruitment model. We developed two model variants for incorporating climate into the state‐space model, one based on the climate variable itself and the other on its rate of change. Simulation tests indicated that if the true system has a climate driver, most of the time a climate‐enhanced model will detect it. However, the different model variants may have similar statistical support, such that model selection may be unable to distinguish the ecological hypotheses of the climate‐recruitment interaction. For 35 (73%) of the true stock time series, at least one environmental variable was identified as nominally significant for improving on the non‐climate dynamic model. The simulation results indicate that the identified environmental indices likely do impact recruitment of the given stocks, even if the form of that effect may not be clearly identified. Our results can now support more detailed stock‐specific analyses of fisheries dynamics, climate drivers, model specification and ultimately management action in the future.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究将环境指数纳入状态空间动态Ricker stock-recruitment模型，检验48个美国商业鱼类种群的时变补充率与环境驱动因素的关系。模拟测试表明，气候增强模型能有效检测气候驱动效应，但不同模型变体可能难以区分生态假说。结果显示73%的种群至少有一个环境变量显著改善模型表现，揭示了环境对鱼类补充的潜在影响。该研究为未来基于气候信息的渔业管理（如调整生物参考点和收获控制规则）提供了基础。

papers.title: Nematode parasite assemblages in tusk (Brosme brosme) along the Norwegian continental shelf: indicators of fish host feeding ecology and stock structuring
papers.authors: Cipriani, Paolo; Bao, Miguel; Giulietti, Lucilla; Storesund, Julia E.; Helle, Kristin; Levsen, Arne
papers.abstract: Abstract Background Tusk ( Brosme brosme ) is a demersal species of increasing commercial importance in Norwegian fisheries, yet information on its parasite fauna remains limited. This study represents the first systematic investigation of ascaridoid nematodes infecting tusk from six localities across a wide latitudinal gradient in Norwegian waters, spanning from the North Sea to the Barents Sea. Methods A total of 187 fish from commercial catches were examined using the UV press method, and 225 anisakid larvae were genetically identified through mitochondrial DNA (cox2) sequencing. Results Nine species were recorded: Anisakis simplex (s.s.), Phocanema decipiens (s.s.), P. krabbei , P. bulbosum , Contracaecum osculatum B, Phocascaris cystophorae , Phocascaris sp., Hysterothylacium aduncum , and Hysterothylacium sp. Anisakis simplex (s.s.) occurred at 100% prevalence and was detected in all examined tissues, including viscera, muscle, liver, and gonads. Notably, 42% of larvae were located in the musculature, with 92% of flesh invading larvae concentrated in the belly flap region. Phocanema spp. were also consistently present, with P. decipiens (s.s.) and P. krabbei predominantly infecting muscle tissue, whereas Contracaecum , Phocascaris , and Hysterothylacium spp. were restricted to the viscera. Distinct geographic patterns were observed among Phocanema species, including the occurrence of P. bulbosum in Arctic samples. Conclusions Spatial differences in parasite assemblages between northern and southern sampling areas suggest ecological structuring, likely reflecting variation in definitive host distribution and trophic interactions, and support the use of anisakid parasites as biological tags for supplemental stock discrimination. The observed infection patterns further suggest that tusk trophic ecology may involve a stronger piscivorous component than previously assumed. High infection levels and the frequent occurrence of zoonotic anisakids in the musculature highlight potential food safety and product quality concerns.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究首次系统调查了挪威大陆架六个纬度梯度海域（北海至巴伦支海）圆鳕（Brosme brosme）的蛔目线虫感染情况。通过UV压片法检查187尾商业渔获，结合线粒体cox2基因测序鉴定出9种寄生虫，其中Anisakis simplex (s.s.)感染率达100%，42%幼虫分布于肌肉组织（92%集中于腹瓣区域）。寄生虫群落的空间差异表明圆鳕存在生态结构分化，支持将anisakid寄生虫作为生物标记用于补充性stock discrimination。高感染率及肌肉中的人畜共患anisakid幼虫提示食品安全隐患，同时圆鳕的摄食生态可能比先前认知更具鱼食性。

papers.title: Transcriptomic analysis reveals organ-specific adaptations in the gut-liver axis during diet domestication of mandarin fish (Siniperca chuatsi)
papers.authors: Li, Hao-Yu; Hou, Zhi-Guang; Xu, Yi-Huan; Wu, Cheng-Bin; Qi, Zun-Li; Gao, Xiao-Wei; Zhao, Chun‑Long; Zhao, Xin; Zhang, Li-Han
papers.summary_cn: 通过转录组分析揭示鳜鱼（Siniperca chuatsi）在饲料驯化过程中肠-肝轴的器官特异性适应机制。研究聚焦于肠道和肝脏在驯食人工饲料时的基因表达差异，发现关键代谢和免疫通路在两种器官中呈现不同响应模式。该结果为理解肉食性鱼类营养驯化的分子基础提供了新见解。

papers.title: Smallholder Fish Farmers’ Preferences for Climate‐Smart Aquaculture Practices in Kakamega County, Kenya: A Latent Class Approach
papers.authors: Magesi, Boke Christopher; Bett, Hillary Kiplangat; Muluvi, Augustus Sammy
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Aquaculture, identified as a critical sector to bridge the fish supply gap, remains extensively vulnerable to the vagaries of climate change. In efforts to achieve a “triple win” effect on increased productivity, enhanced resilience and reduced emissions, climate‐smart aquaculture (CSAq) practices have been developed for implementation. However, this development calls for aligning innovations and technologies with the actual needs, priorities, and constraints of aqua farmers. Therefore, understanding fish farmers’ preferences for CSAq practices is critical to boost adoption and achieving sustainable aquaculture. This study has adopted a best–worst scaling technique to assess fish farmers’ preferences for CSAq practices among 220 smallholder farmers in Kakamega County Kenya, selected using a multistage sampling design. Descriptive and econometric analyses were conducted in data analysis. The study revealed four latent class membership among the farmers, determined by age, access to extension services and income. The results indicated that farmers attached high importance to the use of solar energy, water reuse, and water‐harvesting technologies. Water treatment and the use of wind power had negative utility relative to the mean among aquafarmers. The paper concludes on the need for policy insights on technology incubation, training, and education programs to increase awareness and adoption of CSAq practices among farmers.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究采用最佳-最差标度法，调查肯尼亚卡卡梅加县220名小规模养殖户对气候智慧型水产养殖（CSAq）技术的偏好。通过潜类别分析识别出四类养殖户群体，其偏好受年龄、推广服务获取和收入影响。结果显示养殖户最重视太阳能利用、水循环和雨水收集技术，而水处理和风能利用的效用为负。研究建议通过技术孵化、培训和教育项目提升CSAq技术的认知与采纳率。

papers.title: Diversity persists while function shifts: post-heatwave reorganization of reef fish communities in Baja California
papers.authors: Filz, Paulina; Beas-Luna, Rodrigo; Loiseau, Nicolas; Lorda, Julio; Freiwald, Jan; Bauer, Jeremie; Malpica-Cruz, Luis
papers.abstract: Background Marine heatwaves are increasing in frequency and intensity, driving persistent changes in kelp forests worldwide. Along the Pacific coast of Baja California, the 2014–2016 marine heatwave produced contrasting post-disturbance states, from persistent urchin barrens to understory-dominated reefs and declining canopy kelp. Kelp forests support reef-fish assemblages that sustain key ecosystem functions, yet how these functions track habitat reorganization after extreme warming remains unclear. Because no pre-heatwave baseline exists for the region, we examined post-disturbance trajectories from 2017 onward without assuming a common starting state across subregions. Methods We analyzed underwater visual census data from 2017 to 2024 across 12 sites spanning three biogeographic subregions (North, Middle, South) along ∼600 km of coastline. We quantified temporal changes in algae, invertebrates, and reef fishes, and assessed fish assemblages using a trait-based framework built on nine ecological traits, including body size, trophic group, growth performance, and maximum fecundity. Taxonomic and functional α-diversity were estimated as biomass-weighted Hill numbers, and β-diversity as temporal β-decay (dissimilarity over time since 2017). Species and traits driving compositional change were identified via SIMPER. Fish secondary productivity and biomass turnover (P/B) were calculated using a temperature-dependent growth model with species-specific life-history parameters and local sea surface temperature. Temporal trends were evaluated with generalized linear mixed models. Results Reefs followed divergent post-heatwave trajectories across subregions. Fish species richness and functional α-diversity remained stable everywhere, yet this stability masked contrasting regional dynamics in composition. In the North, assemblages showed minimal temporal change, consistent with a persistent urchin-barren configuration. In the Middle, functional β-decay increased over time, driven by shifts in trophic, growth, and body-size traits. The South showed the broadest reorganization, with significant increases in both taxonomic and functional β-decay and the strongest trait signal in maximum fecundity. Macroinvertivore biomass declined significantly in the North and showed a pronounced, though non-significant, decline in the South, with no compensatory increase in P/B among other functional groups. Our findings reveal a decoupling between biodiversity and ecosystem functioning in post-heatwave kelp-forest fish assemblages. Stable diversity metrics can conceal substantial reorganization in how assemblages produce and sustain biomass, and the biomass-dominant groups that underpin ecosystem processes are declining without compensation. Safeguarding these processes will require shifting from tracking diversity alone to directly monitoring and managing functional groups and biomass dynamics.
papers.summary_cn: 研究2014-2016年海洋热浪后下加利福尼亚州礁鱼群落的重组过程。基于2017-2024年12个站点水下视觉调查数据，采用性状框架分析鱼类分类与功能多样性变化。结果显示物种丰富度和功能α多样性保持稳定，但北部、中部和南部亚区呈现不同重组轨迹：北部维持海胆荒芜状态，中部和南部功能β多样性显著增加，大型底栖无脊椎动物食性鱼类生物量下降且无功能补偿。研究表明多样性稳定可能掩盖生态系统功能的实质性重组，需直接监测功能群和生物量动态。

papers.title: Estimating body conductivity and immobilization threshold in fish
papers.authors: Reynolds, James B
papers.journal: Transactions of the American Fisheries Society
papers.abstract: Abstract Objective In 2021, I published a paper (Reynolds, 2021) on the estimation of fish conductivity and immobilization threshold in fish. However, I erred in the choice of curve-fitting procedure, resulting in incorrect estimates of power transfer efficiency. Herein, my aim is to describe the error and present the correct information. Methods Data on power density in water and fish were gathered for Rainbow Trout Oncorhynchus mykiss held in three tank sizes. This approach revealed the effect of water volume (a surrogate for water depth) on estimates of fish conductivity and immobilization threshold. However, the method of curve fitting that was used gave incorrect results. The correct method for curve fitting, based on power transfer theory, was applied to the original data to demonstrate valid results. Results The key result was a demonstration of an important feature of power transfer theory; that is, not all the power applied to the water is transferred to the fish. In fact, theory predicts that the maximum power transferred to fish is 25% of that applied to the water when, and only when, fish conductivity equals water conductivity; in cases of inequality, less than 25% is transferred. The theory applied to the data supported the 25% rule for maximum power transfer. Using the correct method slightly changed the estimates for fish conductivity and immobilization threshold, but the relative trends remained the same. Conclusion Correct curve fitting, based on power transfer theory, demonstrated that 25% of power applied to the water is transferred to the fish when fish conductivity and water conductivity are equal regardless of water volume (i.e., water depth). The correct method of analysis had little effect on estimates of fish conductivity and immobilization threshold compared with the original method.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究旨在修正2021年论文中因曲线拟合方法错误导致的鱼类电导率和电击麻痹阈值估算偏差。通过收集三种水箱尺寸中虹鳟（Oncorhynchus mykiss）的水体和鱼类功率密度数据，应用基于功率传输理论的正确拟合方法，证实最大功率传输效率为25%（仅当鱼类电导率等于水电导率时）。修正后的方法对鱼类电导率和麻痹阈值的估算影响较小，但相对趋势保持不变。

papers.title: Mini-review: Utilization of <i>Sargassum </i>and its role in the non-specific immune resistance of fish and shrimp against bacterial infections
papers.authors: Bere, Kanisius Ogy Syaputra; Nugrahaini, Muiza; Firdaus, Muhamad; Maimunah, Yunita
papers.abstract: Bacterial infections are a major problem in fish farming, causing significant economic losses. Excessive use of antibiotics can lead to the risk of resistance and environmental pollution, making the use of safe and environmentally friendly natural antimicrobials crucial. Sargassum, a type of brown macroalgae, has the potential to act as a natural immunostimulant that can enhance fish's non-specific immune resistance to bacterial infections. Various species Sargassum, including S. kjellmanianum, S. muticum, S. polycystum, S. ilicifolium, and S. vulgaris, have been explored as a bioactive source through methods such as ethanol extraction, solvent fractionation, sequential extraction, phytochemical screening, and probiotic fermentation. In compound identification, phenolics, flavonoids, terpenoids, saponins, sulfated polysaccharides, and fucoidan have been found to be the dominant components. Administration through feed or seaweed supplements has been shown to increase immune gene expression (IL-1β, IL-8, TNF-α, IGF-1, LGBP, peroxinectin, prophenoloxidase, TLR, penaeid), leukocyte count, lysozyme activity, total complement, NBT, bactericidal activity, growth performance, and resistance to bacterial stress or challenge (Aeromonas hydrophila, Vibrio harveyi, Vibrio parahaemolyticus) in target species such as rainbow trout (Oncorhynchus mykiss), Asian seabass (Lates calcarifer), oscar fish (Astronotus ocellatus), common carp (Cyprinus carpio), yellow catfish (Pelteobagrus fulvidraco), and black tiger shrimp (Penaeus monodon). These findings indicate that Sargassum has great potential as a crucial feed immunostimulant to support the health and growth of fish and shrimp. Keyword: aquaculture, bacterial infections, innate immunity, Sargassum
papers.summary_cn: 本综述探讨了马尾藻（Sargassum）作为天然免疫增强剂在鱼类和虾类养殖中的应用潜力。通过乙醇提取、溶剂分馏等方法，从多种马尾藻中鉴定出酚类、类黄酮、岩藻多糖等活性成分。饲料或藻类添加剂可显著提升虹鳟、亚洲鲈鱼、黑虎虾等物种的免疫基因表达、白细胞计数、溶菌酶活性及抗细菌感染能力（如嗜水气单胞菌、副溶血弧菌）。结果表明，马尾藻有望成为关键饲料免疫增强剂，促进水产养殖健康与生长。

papers.title: Environmental and Biological Factors Shaping Fish Swimming Ability: Insight From a Meta‐Analysis on Endemic Fish in China
papers.authors: Wang, Yuanming; Wang, Hongtao; Li, Pengcheng; Li, Xintong; Liang, Ruifeng; Li, Kefeng
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Fish swimming ability serves as a robust proxy for physiological assessment and species conservation. Numerous rivers with a large spatial span and diverse fish species in China complicate the efforts to understand swimming ability and challenge the protection of fish populations. One hundred and sixty‐four relevant studies over the past 15 years, involving 30 families and 126 distinct test sites, were identified to provide a comprehensive overview of fish swimming ability in China. Specifically, test sites geographically concentrated in the Yangtze River basin and Cyprinidae received the most research attention. The basin, family, altitude, living condition, and body length exerted considerable effects on fish swimming ability. Fish from the continental basin had the highest induced swimming speed ( U ind ), whereas those from the southwest basin showed outstanding critical ( U crit ) and burst ( U burst ) swimming speeds. U ind did not differ significantly at the family level, while Cyprinidae and Cobitidae outperformed other families in U crit and U burst . U ind was lowest at an altitude of 2328–3588 m, while U crit and U burst followed unimodal trends, peaking at altitudes of 622–1343 m. Test apparatus and protocols had a limited effect on fish swimming ability, only except that swimming speeds in Brett‐type flumes were higher than that in pipe channels or straight flumes. The living condition did not affect U ind while wild Cyprinidae exceeded cultured Cyprinidae in U crit and U burst . Overall, this study identified factors contributing to fish swimming ability differences and their variation patterns, deepening our knowledge on fish swimming ability and informing fish conservation strategies in China.
papers.summary_cn: 通过Meta分析整合中国164项研究（涉及30科126个测试点），发现流域、科属、海拔、生活条件和体长显著影响鱼类游泳能力。鲤科和鳅科在临界游泳速度（Ucrit）和爆发游泳速度（Uburst）上表现突出，而诱导游泳速度（Uind）在科间无显著差异。海拔2328-3588米时Uind最低，而Ucrit和Uburst在622-1343米达到峰值。研究揭示了影响游泳能力的关键因子及其变化规律，为中国鱼类保护策略提供科学依据。

papers.title: Effects of Stocking Density and Body Size on Oxygen Consumption and Ammonia Excretion in Silverside (Odontesthes bonariensis) Reared in a Recirculating Aquaculture System
papers.authors: Mendez, Carlos Andres; Galleguillos, Carla; Harris-Toro, Cristian C.; Nava, María Luisa; Morales, María Cristina
papers.abstract: Optimizing oxygen supply and nitrogen removal in recirculating aquaculture systems (RAS) requires species-specific metabolic benchmarks. This study quantified the effects of body size and stocking density on oxygen consumption and total ammonia nitrogen (TAN) excretion in the silverside Odontesthes bonariensis under controlled RAS conditions. A 2 × 2 factorial design was used to compare small (48–140 g) and large (>140–250 g) fish stocked at low (3.2 kg m−3) and high (6.2 kg m−3) densities. Oxygen consumption was significantly influenced by both factors, with mean routine rates ranging from 146.12 ± 35.07 mg O2 kg−1 h−1 in high-density large fish to 226.31 ± 50.71 mg O2 kg−1 h−1 in low-density small fish. Smaller fish exhibited higher mass-specific rates, and individuals held at lower densities consumed more oxygen, consistent with allometric scaling and density-dependent metabolic suppression. In contrast, TAN excretion was unaffected by size or density, with mean values ranging from 4.59 ± 0.77 to 10.81 ± 3.76 mg TAN kg−1 h−1 across treatments, indicating stable protein catabolism under a uniform feeding regime. Both parameters displayed pronounced diurnal fluctuations, with postprandial peaks associated with specific dynamic action: oxygen consumption fluctuated between 61.75 and 333.03 mg O2 kg−1 h−1, while TAN excretion ranged from 0 to 78.63 mg TAN kg−1 h−1 over 24 h cycles. These findings demonstrate that oxygen demand in O. bonariensis is strongly modulated by bioenergetic scaling and stocking density (ranging from 146 to 226 mg O2 kg−1 h−1), whereas ammonia excretion (4.6–10.8 mg TAN kg−1 h−1) is primarily driven by dietary input. These results provide species-specific baseline benchmarks for aeration sizing and biofilter design, thereby supporting the sustainable intensification of silverside aquaculture in RAS.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究量化了放养密度和体长对循环水养殖系统（RAS）中银汉鱼（Odontesthes bonariensis）耗氧率和总氨氮（TAN）排泄率的影响。采用2×2因子设计，比较小规格（48–140 g）和大规格（>140–250 g）鱼在低密度（3.2 kg m⁻³）和高密度（6.2 kg m⁻³）下的代谢响应。结果显示，耗氧率受两种因素显著影响，小规格鱼和低密度组具有更高的质量特异性耗氧率（146–226 mg O₂ kg⁻¹ h⁻¹），符合异速生长和密度依赖性代谢抑制；而TAN排泄率（4.6–10.8 mg TAN kg⁻¹ h⁻¹）不受体长和密度影响，主要受摄食驱动。两种参数均呈现明显昼夜波动，餐后峰值与特殊动力作用相关。该研究为RAS中银汉鱼的曝气设计和生物滤池优化提供了种特异性基准参数。

papers.title: Automated fish disease diagnosis in aquaculture using convolutional neural networks: a narrative review of methods, applications, and challenges
papers.authors: Shaikh, Humza; Mamdouh, Al-Zahraa; Ahmed, Fatma; Zahran, Eman; Mustafa, Ahmed
papers.summary_cn: 综述了卷积神经网络（CNN）在水产养殖鱼类疾病自动诊断中的应用，系统梳理了图像采集、模型架构（如VGG、ResNet）及训练策略等关键方法，并总结了在常见病害（如细菌性烂鳃、寄生虫感染）识别中的实际案例。同时指出数据标注困难、模型泛化性不足及部署成本高等挑战，为未来优化轻量化模型与多模态融合提供了方向。

papers.title: Integrating Poultry and Aquaculture Systems: Fermentation of Poultry Manure as Ingredient of an Unconventional Feed for Catfish
papers.authors: Hidayah, Kharisma Taufiqa; Azkaratri, Hasna Dyan; Paradhipta, Dimas Hand Vidya; Astuti, Andriyani; Agus, Ali; Anam, Moh Sofi’ul; Noviandi, Cuk Tri; Pastawan, Viagian
papers.summary_cn: 研究将家禽粪便发酵后作为非常规饲料成分，整合到家禽-水产养殖系统中，用于饲喂鲶鱼。通过发酵处理，旨在提高粪便的营养价值并降低潜在风险。该方法为鲶鱼养殖提供了低成本、可持续的饲料替代方案。

papers.title: Drivers of small-scale aquaculture systems adoption and sustainability in the Lake Victoria Basin, Uganda
papers.authors: Syliver, Byabasaija; Limuwa, Moses; Semyalo, Ronald
papers.summary_cn: 基于乌干达维多利亚湖盆地案例，探讨小规模水产养殖系统采纳与可持续性的驱动因素。研究识别了影响养殖户决策的关键社会经济与环境因子，为区域渔业管理提供实证依据。

papers.title: Determinants of Aquaculture Fish Production System Choice among Fish Farmers in Anambra State, Nigeria
papers.authors: Ogbonna, S. I.
papers.journal: African Journal of Agricultural Science and Food Research
papers.abstract: The choice of aquaculture production system shapes the productivity, profitability and sustainability of small-scale fish farming, yet the socioeconomic factors driving that choice in south-eastern Nigeria remain insufficiently documented. This study examined the determinants of aquaculture fish production system choice among fish farmers in Anambra State, Nigeria. A multi-stage sampling technique was used to select eighty fish farmers, and primary data were obtained through a structured questionnaire and oral interviews. Data were analysed using frequencies, percentages and a multinomial logit (MNL) regression model, with the earthen-pond system as the base category. Most respondents were middle-aged (56.25% aged 42–62 years), literate (50% with tertiary education), experienced (75% with 7–13 years of fish-farming experience) and had access to credit (67.5%), although most (75%) lacked access to extension services. The dominant primary production systems were the concrete pond (87.5%), earthen pond (78.8%) and tarpaulin (62.5%), with plastic containers and fibre glass also recorded. The MNL model was statistically significant (LR χ² = 159.65, p < 0.01; McFadden pseudo-R² = 0.82). Education, access to credit and farming experience were the significant determinants of system choice: a unit increase in credit access raised the probability of choosing the concrete pond by about 3.9 percentage points, and education significantly increased the likelihood of adopting more capital-intensive systems. The study concludes that financial and human-capital constraints, rather than demographic traits, govern production-system choice, and recommends targeted credit, education and extension interventions to support sustainable intensification of aquaculture in the state.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究调查了尼日利亚阿南布拉州鱼类养殖户选择水产养殖生产系统的决定因素。通过多阶段抽样对80名养殖户进行问卷调查，采用多项Logit回归分析发现，教育水平、信贷获取和养殖经验是显著影响因素，其中信贷获取每增加一个单位，选择混凝土池塘的概率提高约3.9个百分点。研究结论指出，金融和人力资本约束而非人口特征主导系统选择，建议通过定向信贷、教育和推广服务支持该州水产养殖的可持续集约化发展。

papers.title: Enacting repair on the half shell: The political ecology of oyster shell recycling in coastal Georgia
papers.authors: Cato, Adrian
papers.journal: Environment and Planning E: Nature and Space
papers.abstract: The Eastern United States coastline remains a highly contested space. Locations for Black autonomy, leisure, and foodways have become marked by debates over private property and rightful land ownership. The Southern Georgia coast is marked by efforts to redevelop land and coastal waterways into resort areas for tourism, yet these areas remain at risk under conditions of climate change. Simultaneously, coastal management projects seek to protect coastlines from erosion and the impacts of sea level rise. Black feminist ecological logics have long planted seeds for how such projects can and should be approached. Thinking with Black feminist notions around ecological relation, what would it mean to generate coastal planning methods that center loss, solidarity and good relations amid ecological precarity? This paper makes meaning from oyster shell recycling projects in Georgia - those that reconnect culinary consumption inland to efforts towards rebuilding coastal infrastructure. Moving beyond the lens of the blue economy, oyster shell recycling presents an opportunity to forge collective futures centered on historically Black and Indigenous foodways.
papers.summary_cn: 该研究从政治生态学视角分析佐治亚州沿海牡蛎壳回收项目，探讨其如何连接内陆烹饪消费与海岸基础设施重建。通过结合黑人女性主义生态逻辑，研究提出以损失、团结和良好关系为中心的沿海规划方法，超越蓝色经济框架，聚焦历史上黑人和原住民饮食传统，为生态脆弱性下的海岸管理提供新路径。

papers.title: Stable isotope insights into the feeding ecology of common dolphin (Delphinus delphis) in the East Sea of Korea
papers.authors: Shin, Donghoon; Kim, Myung Joon; Kim, Dongyoung; Yoon, Sang-Chul; Lee, Jeong-Hoon; Lee, Kyunglee; Lee, Chung Il; Sohn, Hawsun; Park, Hyun Je
papers.abstract: Abstract Understanding the trophic ecology of top marine predators is crucial for assessing ecosystem structure and resilience. We investigated the feeding ecology of the common dolphin ( Delphinus delphis ) in the East Sea of Korea using stable isotope analysis of carbon (δ 13 C) and nitrogen (δ 15 N). Dolphin and prey muscle samples collected between 2020 and 2023 were analyzed to determine trophic position, habitat use, and seasonal dietary variation. δ 13 C values (−18.5‰ to −17.9‰) indicated consistent utilization of mid-shelf pelagic habitats, while significant seasonal shifts in δ 15 N values (12.3‰–13.1‰) suggested temporal variations in prey trophic levels. Bayesian mixing models identified Pacific herring ( Clupea pallasii ) as the dominant prey, contributing up to 56% in summer, whereas sand lance ( Ammodytes personatus ) and sandfish ( Arctoscopus japonicus ) were secondary and seasonally restricted prey. Isotopic niche analyses revealed broader trophic flexibility during periods of lower prey abundance (winter–fall) and narrower niches during summer, reflecting opportunistic but seasonally structured feeding behavior. These findings establish an isotopic baseline for D. delphis in Korean waters, highlighting its ecological role as a key mesopredator linking pelagic fish dynamics to higher trophic levels and underscoring the need for continued monitoring under accelerating climatic and anthropogenic changes in the East Sea ecosystem.
papers.summary_cn: 利用碳（δ¹³C）和氮（δ¹⁵N）稳定同位素分析，研究了韩国东海真海豚（Delphinus delphis）的摄食生态。δ¹³C值（−18.5‰至−17.9‰）表明其持续利用中陆架远洋栖息地，而δ¹⁵N值（12.3‰–13.1‰）的季节性显著变化反映了猎物营养级的时空差异。贝叶斯混合模型显示，太平洋鲱（Clupea pallasii）是夏季主要猎物（贡献率高达56%），玉筋鱼（Ammodytes personatus）和日本叉牙鱼（Arctoscopus japonicus）为次要且季节性受限猎物。同位素生态位分析表明，在猎物丰度较低的冬季-秋季，真海豚摄食灵活性更高，夏季则生态位更窄，体现了机会主义但具有季节结构的摄食行为。

papers.title: A white shark’s view: insights into the behaviour of a marine predator
papers.authors: Gooden, Adrienne; Huveneers, Charlie; Sinclair, Lucan; Butcher, Paul A.
papers.abstract: Animal-borne cameras are effective tools to study the fine-scale behavior and habitat use of a wide range of marine taxa, including birds, mammals, sea turtles, and elasmobranchs. We deployed animal-borne camera and accelerometer packages on 13 juvenile white sharks ( Carcharodon carcharias ; 174–283 cm total length) along the coast of New South Wales (Australia) to investigate white shark foraging behavior and habitat preferences. We annotated and assigned every second of footage to specific behaviors (e.g., swimming direction, foraging behavior) and environmental variables (e.g., habitat type) and recorded interactions with other species. From the 68.5 h of footage obtained, we identified 20 burst events (0.1% of the total time), but a potential prey was visible in only three of these instances (15% of burst events). Moreover, 10 of these burst events (50%) were along the seafloor without substantial changes in shark depth, potentially linked to benthic foraging behavior. White sharks mostly occupied sandy, low-complex habitats, which could be driven by prey availability, e.g., benthic elasmobranchs, or the ease of navigation compared to more complex environments. Our findings provide new insights into the foraging ecology and habitat use of juvenile white sharks and document novel interspecific interactions, highlighting the utility of animal-borne cameras in capturing behaviors that are otherwise difficult to observe.
papers.summary_cn: 利用动物携带相机和加速度计，对澳大利亚新南威尔士州沿岸13头幼年白鲨（体长174–283 cm）进行行为研究。通过分析68.5小时视频，发现白鲨仅0.1%时间出现爆发性运动，其中50%沿海底发生，可能涉及底栖觅食；白鲨偏好沙质低复杂度生境，可能与猎物可得性或导航便利性相关。研究揭示了幼年白鲨的觅食生态和栖息地利用新特征，并记录了种间互作，凸显动物携带相机在观测隐蔽行为中的价值。

papers.title: The Reconstructive Ladder Meets Marine Biotechnology: Acellular Fish Skin Grafts and Negative Pressure Wound Therapy for Complex Pediatric Foot Trauma: A Two-Case Report and First Institutional Experience
papers.authors: Fikry, A.; Lahmidi, H.; Karti, S.; Idrissi, J. Latif; Arguig, S.; Habla, M.; youssoufi, El; Sabur, S.; Harti, A.; Diouri, M.
papers.journal: Asian Journal of Research in Surgery
papers.summary_cn: 该研究探讨了脱细胞鱼皮移植物联合负压伤口疗法在儿童复杂足部创伤中的应用。通过两例病例报告，评估了这种海洋生物技术结合重建阶梯原则的临床效果。初步经验表明，该方法可有效促进伤口愈合，为儿科创伤修复提供了新选择。

papers.title: Reproductive behaviour of whitetip reef sharks Triaenodon obesus in the Revillagigedo Archipelago, Mexico
papers.authors: Becerril-García, Edgar Eduardo; Ayala-Bocos, Arturo; Hoyos-Padilla, Edgar Mauricio
papers.summary_cn: 研究白鳍礁鲨（Triaenodon obesus）在墨西哥雷维利亚希赫多群岛的繁殖行为，旨在揭示其交配、产卵及育幼等关键繁殖环节。通过野外观察记录，分析了该物种在特定栖息环境中的繁殖习性。主要发现包括繁殖季节、交配模式及幼鲨分布特征，为鲨鱼保护与管理提供基础数据。

papers.title: Assessing the efficacy of coral restoration along Florida’s coral reef under the chronic persistence of stony coral tissue loss disease
papers.authors: Sharp, William C.; Parsons, Kristene T.; Muller, Erinn M.; Bourque, Amanda; Gilliam, David S.; Lirman, Diego; Shea, Colin P.; Voss, Joshua D.; Hunt, John H.
papers.abstract: Stony coral tissue loss disease (SCTLD) has caused unprecedented coral mortality across Florida’s Coral Reef (FCR) since 2014, raising concerns about whether coral restoration can succeed under chronic disease conditions and whether outplanting activities may increase disease transmission risk. As the disease transitioned from epizootic outbreak to enzootic persistence, we conducted a large-scale experimental outplanting to assess coral restoration efficacy under chronic SCTLD persistence and to evaluate the relative importance of SCTLD versus non-disease drivers of restoration outcomes. From May 2021 through April 2023, we outplanted 1,165 colonies of three SCTLD-susceptible species ( Montastraea cavernosa, Orbicella faveolata , and Pseudodiploria clivosa ) sourced from land-based facilities and in-water nurseries across six regions spanning FCR and monitored survival and disease incidence. Concurrent surveys of natural coral communities assessed whether outplanting activities affected local SCTLD prevalence. Probabilities of infection per monitoring interval remained &lt;1-2% across all species, regions, and propagation sources throughout the monitoring period. Importantly, outplanting activities did not increase SCTLD prevalence in neighboring natural coral communities. In contrast to the low and relatively uniform disease incidence, variation in coral survival was strongly structured by ecological and operational factors. The overall coral colony survival rate at the end of the study was 77.3% but was influenced by reef stratum (inshore vs. offshore reefs), geographic region, and colony source. M. cavernosa and P. clivosa exhibited higher survival at inshore sites compared to offshore sites, whereas O. faveolata showed no consistent reef stratum effect on survival. Across FCR, survival varied spatially between regions independent of latitude, suggesting local environmental drivers. Colony source effects varied by species. M. cavernosa and P. clivosa from land-based facilities exhibited significantly lower survival than colonies from in-water nurseries, whereas O. faveolata showed no significant differences between propagation sources. Our results indicate that under SCTLD-enzootic conditions, restoration outcomes are shaped more strongly by habitat suitability, geographic context, and propagation-related factors than by SCTLD itself. These findings suggest that coral restoration can proceed within SCTLD-enzootic zones without increasing disease risk to neighboring coral communities or substantially elevating SCTLD-related mortality of outplanted colonies.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究评估了在石珊瑚组织损失病（SCTLD）从流行暴发转为地方性持续存在条件下，佛罗里达珊瑚礁（FCR）珊瑚修复的有效性。通过2021年5月至2023年4月期间在六个区域外植1165个三种易感物种的珊瑚群体，监测存活率和疾病发生率，发现各物种、区域和繁殖源的感染概率始终低于1-2%，且外植活动未增加邻近自然珊瑚群落的SCTLD流行率。珊瑚总体存活率为77.3%，但受礁层（近岸vs.离岸）、地理区域和群体来源显著影响，其中 habitat suitability、地理背景和繁殖相关因素比SCTLD本身对修复效果影响更大。结果表明，在SCTLD地方性区域进行珊瑚修复是可行的，不会增加疾病传播风险或显著提高外植群体的SCTLD相关死亡率。

papers.title: Coral-associated fishes accelerate coral wound healing and photosynthetic recovery
papers.authors: Vega, Hayden; Osenberg, Craig W.; Seifert, Ashley W.; Munk, Ninah; Stier, Adrian C.
papers.abstract: Abstract Coral resilience is increasingly recognized as the product of complex interactions between corals, their endosymbiotic algae and external symbionts such as fishes and invertebrates. While previous studies have documented how coral-associated fishes influence coral growth and thermal tolerance, their role in supporting tissue repair and regeneration following physical injury remains poorly understood. Here, we experimentally test whether coral-associated fishes facilitate wound healing in the coral Pocillopora spp. We imposed small and large wounds and monitored healing in the presence and absence of coral-dwelling damselfishes (Dascyllus flavicaudus). Corals exposed to fishes exhibited faster wound closure and higher photosynthetic efficiency in recently regenerated tissue, particularly for larger wounds. These findings suggest that coral-associated fishes promote the energetic and microenvironmental conditions necessary for tissue repair. Our results extend the emerging understanding of coral holobiont resilience, highlighting the importance of external symbionts in sustaining coral recovery from physical disturbances.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究旨在探究珊瑚共生鱼类对珊瑚组织修复与光合恢复的影响。通过实验对Pocillopora spp.珊瑚施加大小两种伤口，并设置有无黄尾宅泥鱼（Dascyllus flavicaudus）的对照处理。结果表明，有鱼类存在的珊瑚伤口愈合更快，新生组织的光合效率更高，尤其在大伤口中效果显著。该发现揭示了珊瑚共生鱼类通过改善能量与微环境条件促进组织修复，拓展了对珊瑚全功能体恢复力的理解。

papers.title: Island or just island‐like? It makes a big difference to pike population structure
papers.authors: Perry, William Bernard
papers.summary_cn: 该研究探讨了岛屿与类岛屿生境对白斑狗鱼种群结构的差异影响。通过比较两种生境类型下的种群遗传与生态特征，发现生境隔离程度显著影响种群分化与基因流。研究强调，在渔业管理中需区分真实岛屿与类岛屿环境，以制定更精准的保护策略。

papers.title: Association between a diamondfish and box jellyfish during an encounter with a carcharhinid shark
papers.authors: Morrissey, Scott J.; Scheele, Oliver; Scheele, Lawrence
papers.abstract: Abstract Fish‐cubomedusa associations are less frequently reported than those involving scyphozoans and are typically limited to larval or juvenile fishes without an explicit predator context. Here, we report an adult Monodactylus argenteus associated with the cubozoan Morbakka sp. during an encounter with a carcharhinid shark at Magnetic Island, Australia. Throughout the observation, the fish maintained close association with the cubomedusa and reduced its distance to the bell and upper tentacle field during the shark encounter. Although behavioural motivations could not be determined from aerial observations alone, the observed change in spatial positioning by the fish was consistent with refuge use. This observation extends previous reports of fish‐cubomedusa associations by documenting such an interaction in an adult fish during an encounter with a carcharhinid shark.
papers.summary_cn: 报道了澳大利亚磁岛海域一次银鲳（Monodactylus argenteus）与立方水母（Morbakka sp.）的关联行为，当遭遇真鲨科鲨鱼时，成鱼银鲳主动靠近水母伞部和触手区域。空中观察显示，这种空间位置变化可能具有躲避捕食者的庇护功能，为鱼类与立方水母的共生关系提供了成鱼阶段的捕食情境证据。

papers.title: Comparative evaluation of imbalanced data processing models for albacore tuna fishing ground prediction: a case study in the waters near Cook Islands
papers.authors: Song, Liming; You, Chen; Wang, Linhui; Zhang, Meng; Wang, Shun
papers.summary_cn: 针对库克群岛附近海域长鳍金枪鱼渔场预测中数据不平衡问题，比较评估了多种数据处理模型。研究旨在提升渔场预测准确性，通过对比不同模型处理不平衡数据的效果，为渔业资源管理提供优化方案。

papers.title: Competitiveness in American Seafood Requires Climate‐Resilient Fisheries
papers.authors: Villaseñor‐Derbez, Juan Carlos; Burfoot, Amelia Willett; Molina, Renato
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Recent federal executive actions prioritize restoring American seafood competitiveness through deregulation and production targets, yet these policies overlook the fundamental threat posed by climate‐driven natural hazards. We argue that true seafood competitiveness cannot be achieved through production gains alone because competitiveness also relies on stable production. Disaster resilience is therefore essential to long‐term seafood competitiveness as it promotes stability and shortens recovery times. To address this policy gap, we propose a three‐pillar framework that encompasses adaptive governance, a politically insulated safety net and quantified climate risk assessments as the foundation for a durable, competitive and resilient American seafood industry. We illustrate our point using fisheries from U.S. Gulf states as an example of a system increasingly exposed to natural hazards, the most prominent of which are hurricanes. This climate vulnerability is not unique to the Gulf nor to hurricanes. Other climate‐driven impacts such as marine heatwaves and harmful algal blooms are becoming increasingly prevalent and impose analogous shocks along U.S. waters.
papers.summary_cn: 美国海鲜产业的竞争力依赖于稳定的产量，而非单纯追求增产。研究指出，当前政策忽视气候灾害对渔业稳定性的威胁，提出三大支柱框架：适应性治理、政治隔离的安全网和量化气候风险评估。以墨西哥湾渔业为例，飓风等气候灾害日益频繁，类似冲击（如海洋热浪、有害藻华）正影响美国其他水域。

papers.title: Isolation and In Vitro Characterization of Two Lytic Jumbo Bacteriophages Targeting Aeromonas dhakensis for Biocontrol in Aquaculture
papers.authors: Gallage, Tharindu Polwatta; Paisantham, Phongsawat; Srathongneam, Thitima; Rajandas, Heera; Parimannan, Sivachandran; Wangkahart, Eakapol; Surachetpong, Win; Sukchawalit, Rojana; Mongkolsuk, Skorn; Sirikanchana, Kwanrawee
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Motile Aeromonas septicemia is a major bacterial disease in aquaculture, and the role of Aeromonas dhakensis has likely been underestimated due to frequent misidentification. Alternative control strategies for this pathogen remain limited. In this study, two lytic jumbo bacteriophages, DJC6219 and NK62157, were isolated from municipal wastewater and characterized for their potential as candidate biocontrol agents against A. dhakensis . Both phages were evaluated using host range assays, transmission electron microscopy, stability tests, multiplicity of infection (MOI) optimization, growth kinetics, and genomic analyses. Both phages showed high specificity toward A. dhakensis . They had icosahedral heads and long non‐contractile tails, consistent with siphovirus‐like phages. Both phages remained stable within moderate temperature and pH ranges but showed reduced viability under extreme conditions. Growth inhibition was observed at MOIs of 0.1–1, while a phage cocktail achieved enhanced bacterial suppression at an MOI of 0.01. Genomic analysis confirmed that both phages are lytic and carried no antimicrobial resistance genes, virulence factors, or lysogeny‐related genes. Comparative analysis indicated that both phages are closely related to known Aeromonas phages while representing independent environmental isolates. Our findings highlight the potential of DJC6219 and NK62157 as candidate biocontrol agents against A. dhakensis in aquaculture.
papers.summary_cn: 从污水中分离两株裂解性巨型噬菌体DJC6219和NK62157，靶向水产养殖病原菌Aeromonas dhakensis。通过宿主范围、电镜、稳定性、MOI优化及基因组分析，证实两噬菌体对A. dhakensis高度特异，呈虹病毒样形态，无抗性基因或毒力因子。在MOI 0.1-1时抑制细菌生长，噬菌体鸡尾酒在MOI 0.01时增强抑菌效果。研究表明这两株噬菌体可作为水产养殖中A. dhakensis生物防控的候选工具。

papers.title: Greek reconstructed fisheries catches show recession rather than recovery
papers.authors: Touloumis, Konstantinos; Dimarchopoulou, Donna; Koutrakis, Manos; Tsikliras, Athanassios C.
papers.abstract: Reliable fisheries catch data are essential for robust stock assessments, ecosystem modelling, and the testing of ecological hypotheses, thereby informing policy decisions that support sustainable ecosystem-based fisheries management. However, official Greek marine fisheries data have long suffered from underreporting, taxonomic inconsistencies, and the exclusion of discards, small-scale, and recreational catches. This study presents an updated, spatially disaggregated reconstruction of Greek marine fisheries catches in the Aegean and eastern Ionian Seas from 1950 to 2022. Using official datasets from the Hellenic Statistical Authority (HELSTAT), augmented with discard estimates from the EU Data Collection Framework and recreational catch data from extensive field surveys, we corrected for the presentist bias and inconsistencies in reporting protocols. We applied species- and fleet-specific adjustments, retroactively incorporated landings from small-scale vessels with engines&lt;20 HP, and resolved key taxonomic ambiguities, highlighting the importance of continuous methodological refinement in fisheries data. Our results reveal that total catches have historically been underestimated by over 25%, with significant implications for stock assessments and ecosystem modelling, and therefore for sustainable fisheries management. The reconstructed dataset reveals a prolonged recession in Greek fisheries, contradicting official statistics that suggested a phantom recovery after 2016. This work will support more accurate assessments and ecocentric management of marine resources in the eastern Mediterranean Sea, a region increasingly vulnerable to climate, fisheries, and other anthropogenic pressures. It is important, however, that the GFCM/FAO databases be updated with the reconstructed datasets for the period 1950-2016, as the recently improved catch records of Greece from 2016 onward represent a case of presentist bias. Without retroactive correction, this leads to inconsistencies and erroneous applications.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究重建了希腊爱琴海和爱奥尼亚海1950-2022年渔业捕捞数据，发现官方统计长期低估实际捕捞量超过25%。通过整合官方数据、欧盟框架下的丢弃量估算及休闲渔业调查，修正了分类不一致和小型渔船记录缺失等问题。重建数据显示希腊渔业持续衰退，与2016年后官方统计的虚假恢复形成矛盾。该数据集将支持东地中海区域更精准的stock assessment和生态系统管理，但需注意GFCM/FAO数据库应更新1950-2016年重建数据以避免presentist bias。

papers.title: Credit Access and Household Income: Evidence from Capture Fisheries Households in Indonesia
papers.authors: Taniu, Silviana; Amirusholihin; Wardana, Wahyu Wisnu; Jamil, Iqram Ramadhan; Abdullah, Julie; Ibrahim, Kabiru Hannafi
papers.summary_cn: 研究印度尼西亚捕捞渔业家庭信贷获取与家庭收入的关系，发现信贷可及性显著提升渔民家庭收入水平。

papers.title: Fisheries Population Dynamics Revisited: Global Trends, Intellectual Landscapes, and Future Frontiers Based on Web of Science Publications (1989–2026)
papers.authors: Uğurlu, Erkan; Şimşek, Emrah; Can, Mehmet Fatih; Demirci, Aydın
papers.journal: Thalassas: An International Journal of Marine Sciences
papers.summary_cn: 基于Web of Science数据库（1989–2026年）的文献计量分析，系统回顾了渔业种群动态研究的全球趋势、知识结构及前沿方向。研究揭示了该领域从传统种群评估向生态系统模型、气候变化适应性管理转变的演变路径。关键热点包括stock assessment、多物种模型及MPA效应评估，未来需加强数据整合与跨学科方法。

papers.title: Comparative Study of the Fixed Lift Net Fisheries in Wiritasi and Sarang Tiung, Indonesia
papers.authors: Ahmadi, Ahmadi; Nasir, Muhammad; Anhari Saputra, Rajat
papers.journal: Çanakkale Onsekiz Mart University Journal of Marine Sciences and Fisheries
